      "n": 24,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Kad tee nu nahze Uppu-
rus un Dedsamo-Uppurus uppu-
reht/ tad eezeble Jeïs abra astex-
Definitis Wihrus/ un fazzija: Ja
kas no teem Wihreem/ ko es jums
efimu Rohkā dewis/isbehgs/ tad
winna Dwehfele ta pascha
Dwehfeles Weeta buhs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 25,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Kad nu tas Dedsamo-
Uppuris pabeigts ktuā/ tad faz-
zija Jeïs us teem Pawaldnee-
keem un us teem Wirfneekem.
Nahzeet/ nn kanject tohs/ ka
ne weens isbehg. Un tee kawe
tohs ar Sobbiia Asmini/ un tee
Pawaldneeki un Wirfneeki met-
te tohs nohsr/ un gahje Pilsfah-
tā us Bāāla Namnn.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 26,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tee isneffe Bāāla us-
zeltas Bildes/ un fadedsinaja
tahs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 27,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tee arrī nolansija to us-
zeltu Bāāla Bildi/ lihds ar Ba-
ala Namnu/ un padarrija to par
Langwegeem/ lihds tchoddeen.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 28,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ta isdeldeja Jeïs to Ba-
alu no Israëta.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 29,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet no Jerobeama Nee-
bata Dehla Grehkeem/ kas Isra-
elu grehkoht darrija/ Jeïs ne at-
stabhjags/ teem pakat dsihda-
mees/ prohti no teem Selta Tet-
teem/ kas Betelē un Dannā bija.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 30,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tas KUNGS fazzi-
15, ja us Jeïsu: Tapehz ka tew labs
Prahts bijis darriht/ kas man
patizzis/ un efti Akaba Nam-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 31,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "man darrijs wiffu/ kas manna
Sirdi bija/ tad sehdehs tarvt
Dehli tew us Israëta Krehsflu
lihds zettortam Augumain.
Bet Jeïs ne paſarga-
jahs/ ka tas buhtu staigajs eektch
ta KUNGA Israëta Deewa
Bauslibas ar wiffu fatvu Sir-
di/ wiꞥsch ne atstabhjahs no Je-
robeama Grehkeem/ kas Israëlu
grehkoht darrijis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 32,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tanni Laika eefahze tas
KUNGS no Israëta atraut/ jo
Asaëls kawe tohs wiﬀās Israëta
Rohbeschās.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 33,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "No Jardana puﬀes prett
Rhiteem/ wiffu Semmi Gilead/
tohs Gadditerus/ un Rubbenite-
us/ un Manaftterus/ no Aroē-
ra/ kas pee tahs Uppes Arnon
gutl/ un Gileadu/ un Bahsanu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 34,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un kas wehl no Jetifs-
Leetahm atteek/ un wiff/ ko wiﬀā-
irr Darrijs/ un wiff winu-

sraëta kehnizu Laiku-Gral mata
"
    },
    {
      "n": 35,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Jeïs aismigge ar fa-

winnu eektch Samarijas/ u-

"
    },
    {
      "n": 36,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tas Laiks/ tamehr J-
us pahr Israëlu waldijs eekt-
